title: Datadog Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Datadog Q4 2024 Earnings Key Metrics and Guidance. Financial Performance: Q4 Revenue 738M plus 25 percent YoY, exceeding guidance. Free Cash Flow 241M with 33 percent margin. ARR Milestone: Exceeded 3 billion total. Product Breakdown ARR: Infrastructure Monitoring 1.25B plus, Log Management 750M plus, End-to-End APM 750M plus. Customer Metrics: Total Customers approximately 30,000 plus 2,700 YoY. Customers with 100K plus ARR: 3,610 plus 420 YoY. 1M plus ARR Customers: 462 plus 66 YoY. Fortune 500 Penetration: 45 percent up from 42 percent. 2025 Guidance: Q1: Revenue 737-741M representing 21 percent growth. FY2025: Revenue 3.175-3.195B representing 18-19 percent growth. Operating Margin: 21 percent. Strategic Highlights: CEO Olivier Pomel emphasized digital transformation and cloud migration as long-term secular growth drivers.
